name: Rift Hero: Mixed Reality Horde Survival

reviews.review_description:
I bought Rift Hero: Mixed Reality Horde Survival because the concept and visuals looked great. The official gameplay video clearly shows all 15 levels in action, which influenced my purchase decision:

Link: https://youtu.be/m-3aHcYnY-Q

However, in the actual game, the levels never unlock due to a persistent bug. Despite trying for hours and contacting the developers via Discord, the issue remains unresolved.

Multiple players are reporting the same problem on Reddit and Discord, so this is not an isolated issue.

Because I spent over two hours trying to unlock content, Meta Quest 3 refuses a refund, leaving me stuck with a game that does not function as advertised.

This feels misleading and potentially scam-like. I urge potential buyers to be cautious until this issue is fixed.

If you encounter a level where a wave of zombies never come out, go to settings switch your gun to automatic firing go back to the level and slowly turn to the right outside and inside your building, the gun will fire when it finds them and will trigger that group to come out. But it has to be aimed directly at them so go slow and try different angles.

There is one level, where a small group gets stuck behind a dumpster right around the right corner, they won't come out so you have to raise the gun high and aim down and kill them where they are stuck (it will happen multiple times in that level. 

Good luck! And hopefully the creators get this fixed soon as it's super frustrating and drastically takes away from the fun, I won't be recommending this game to anyone till it's been patched, I will also change my rating once that happens..

reviews.review_title: Needs work but a fun shooter
reviews.review_description:
These kinds of MR games are quite a staple on the store these days but does Rift Hero add anything new? Well to be honest I've not played that many so I can't answer my own question but I've been having fun with this one and that's surely the most important thing with gaming right?!

There are plenty of upgrades to unlock that will keep you blasting away for quite some time, or alternatively you can purchase gold with real cash if that's how you like to play. It's not pay to win and everything can be earned in game so I don't mind that being an option for gamers.

Feedback wise there are several things that could definitely improve the game. Haptics are pretty much missing which would add immersion to the gunplay.
The audio design needs a bit of tweaking as you hear zombies behind you that clearly aren't, 3D audio maybe?
As for enemy variety this could be easily fixed by simply changing clothing colours/patterns on the existing models, it would give the illusion of more enemy types than there actually is.

Overall it has potential and is fun! Check out my first impressions gameplay over on my YouTube!
😁✌️☮️❤️

developer_response.body:
thanks for your great and informative feedback. we've noted the points you mentioned and keep improving!
wish you have fun playing this game and our upcoming games too!

reviews.review_description: Cant shoot.. only reload.. i end up dead as theres no way to shoot.. nothing to tell me otherwise on the screen.. iv pressed every button ans nothing works.. looks like it would of been a good game though.. shame.

developer_response.body: Sorry to hear this issue. We've updated a new version to 2.0 today, can you try update your app to latest version and see if the issue is fixed?

reviews.review_description:
Looked like it doesn't work. I had waited for zombie even after 2 minutes since the game had begun. But I couldn't see any zombie at all. I could hear their sound but not seen.

***********************************************
Thank you, developer team! After your message, it worked perfectly.
I like this game much! Appreciate for your support!

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for updating. We'll make sure this issue does not appear again. We'll keep you posted on the latest updates as well. In case you have any additional questions or suggestions, you can directly reach out to me at skycampstudio@gmail.com. Stay tuned!

reviews.review_description: Just maybe more detail and other monster models just some polish but it's a gem

developer_response.body: thanks for your feedback! glad you like it. we'll keep improving.

reviews.review_description: Normal game, at the end of the working day to relax and shoot, but a little long and monotonous

developer_response.body: Thanks for your feedback. We've updated the version to 2.0 and add quite a few new updates, including new weapons and levels. Wish you like it better in the latest version.

reviews.review_description:
But no controller vibration.
Feels empty without it. And why so huge guns?
Still Great 👍

developer_response.body: Hello Rocky, the controller vibration is added in the latest version (have you upgraded?). It's configurable in the setting section. We are adjusting the size of guns in coming version (next major updates will be before end of Jan). Stay tuned!

reviews.review_description: Had high hopes for this as it was in mixed reality,  but once into it it’s a fast paced wave shooter , but in mixed reality it stands out

developer_response.body: Thanks Martin for your kind review. We're actually launching a full release in a few days with a number of updates, including 15 uniquely designed levels, 10+ new monsters as well as a storyline and hologram system...we'll make new improvements with MR tower defense elements and upgraded portal system later next month. Stay tuned!

reviews.review_description: I kill all zombies but there's always one zombie that gets stuck

reviews.review_title: a true roguelike survivor horde for MR
reviews.review_description:
I have constantly been on the hunt for a vampire survivor-esque roguelike game on Quest, and this shooter is an absolute gem that truly delivers on that front. Every aspect of this game has been painstakingly designed from the ground up with mixed reality in mind.

The graphics are nothing short of incredible. They are so vivid and immersive that you feel completely transported into the game world. The power-up system is also a major highlight. It's well-crafted and adds a great deal of depth and strategy to the gameplay.

What's more, it's a free-to-play game! That's right, you can enjoy all of this awesomeness without having to spend a dime. It's truly a steal.

If you're a fan of roguelike games or just looking for an exciting new experience on Quest, this shooter is definitely worth trying. It's a game that will keep you coming back for more with its engaging gameplay, stunning visuals, and clever power-up system. Don't miss out on this amazing opportunity to dive into a world of adventure and excitement.

This VR horde-style game is an absolute blast! It’s like DOOM in VR, with non-stop action and intense combat. Instead of running away, you get stronger as you play, finding powerful items to fight back against waves of enemies.

The variety of enemies keeps things exciting, and the gameplay is so fun that you’ll keep coming back to see how far you can go. If you love fast-paced action and challenging gameplay, this one’s for you!

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for your enthusiastic review of our VR horde - style game! We're thrilled to hear that you're having a great time with it and comparing it to the iconic DOOM in VR really makes our day.
We also appreciate that you're enjoying the variety of enemies and the engaging gameplay. As for the areas you might have noticed that could use some improvement, we've got some exciting plans in the works.
We're currently developing the latest version, which is expected to be released by the end of this month. In this new version, we'll be adding over 15 new enemies. These new foes will bring different attack patterns and challenges, further enhancing the variety and excitement you already love. Additionally, we're introducing 12 new scenarios. These new settings will not only provide fresh backdrops for the battles but also offer unique gameplay elements.
We're confident that these improvements will take the game to the next level, and we can't wait for you to try it out. Your continued support and feedback are invaluable to us. If you have any other ideas or suggestions, please don't hesitate to let us know.
